comment.body: the worst part is it can be that easy... early in my career i knew a guy who wanted to mentor me to one day take over his financial advisor/insurance business. and that was the whole of his strategy.  i wasn't interested (thank god lol) because he would always tell his customers in dips to buy the dip, they always "wanted to wait until things got better" or something, would complain when they bought high and market dipped, he would tell them to hold it would get better, no avail.  basically they could be up >%100 last few years and still the grass would be greener some other way...   lol, i have another friend who literally makes powerpoint's to complain to his financial advisors about their performance in his 401k lol... ( i give him advice on what to say sometimes, fuck those guys lol). but looking back on all this, i think a lot of these guys found RH or whatever app on their phone and thought why not put their money where their mouth is... now complaining to their financial advisor has turned into complaining to ppl on chats because ego is delicate, and the same mindset of heindsight and " damn it was so clear and so easy but something/someone else is to blame cuz it wasn't me" .     idk, sorry for the rant. but it can be that easy. thats whats sad.

comment.body:
These type of random processes would humble everyone; patience means that one will accept that there will be periods of underperformance. If one inverts, one can ask if one should be happy if every price action were predictable and every trade were brightly green? 

Isn't happy-go-easy too good to be true? Or is it not better to see that even with all the data, insider info, algorithms and headaches, still one might be frustrated by the unpredictable at times? "There is no royal road..." 

If anything, we might have underestimated the administration's will to maintain market calmness and not to show weakness.

comment.body:
I’ve not been around for the past 2 weeks on this chat and missed much of what people are frustrated about. 

So can’t speak to the moments that mattered and how her analysis helped or didn’t help

But all I can say is that people subscribe here coming in like in all things, with different degrees of what I’d call trading readiness (knowledge, mental EQ/IQ, lessons learned, and failure/success rate). 

Everyone comes here searching to help improve from where they are. 

Ask yourself have you learned something by being here. Was it something that you could take and do yourself or were you just acting on what you thought was advice (which btw is not what this service is and not service will ever claim to offer financial advice)

If the former, then you’ve gotten something from this $35 service. Improve 1% each month at $35 and you’ll become a better trader. Full stop

comment.body: i firmly believe that law of attraction/self fulfilling prophecy or whatever is strong in gambling...  if your loosing, or "revenge trading", or not in the zone your gonna keep loosing.  ppl will miss 5 good calls and finally take the bad one because they r in that mindset. like that movie Two for the Money.  when Matthew McConaughey gave the sports betting "signals"...  and dont get it twisted... if you aren't hedging or playing a strategy or weighing risk/reward.  relying solely on "calls or signals".. your not trading your gambling.

comment.body: The opinions are mixed right now. Which is why you're seeing more "day-by-day" calls than anything. The bear case is that there is definitely damage that is working its way through the economy and we should start to see that data appearing (it has started somewhat). The bull case is that we're seeing trade deals and the worst is behind us and that trump + bessent are aware of where the real risks are (bond market). My personal opinion is that its a bear market rally only because the dude literally has created covid like conditions without the pandemic lol

comment.body:
Reading all the messages of this morning and these days, I would like to say only one thing:
KEEP THIS ENVIRONMENT AT HIGH EDUCATIONAL LEVEL, just how it has started. More educ question from our teacher are appreciated, mistakes misinterpretation it’s fine, it’s just part of the game, but they are the past. Let’s focus on the present. Let’s let Alma be what she is the best out there to do——> TEACHING US TO THINK IN TERM OF PROBABILITY.
We all made mistake in the past but that’s not the point, who is here want to learn. I didn’t write these days for this reason, I don’t fucking care is someone made mistake or misinterpretation, I WANT TO LEARN THE THINGS THAT NO ONE OUT THERE WILL EVER TEACH YOU.  So as long as I read here Inquisitorial courtroom lines, I won’t participate. Doing this we will become the same of all the other shitty chat out there. Thanks 
Have a great day
